description: Overall, the platform is excellent and significantly saves time and effort in managing assets. One of the features I most like is the ability to create custom fields, which can be added to the item page and included in custom reports. Additionally, the import and export functionality is very useful.
author: Hany E.
pros: - Dedicated the item specifications - Custom Fields - Licenses Optimizer - Asset Management - Custom Dashboards - Customs Reports
cons: I would like to highlight that the cost of the platform appears to be relatively high, Furthermore, More attention could be given to enhancing the mobile application. I would like to suggest adding a new feature that automatically detects the item’s location no need to add it manually.

author: Jean D.
pros: I really like how seamlessly integrates with platforms like Google, Jamf and Zendesk. Having the ability to get all our managed devices right away without installing an agent was definitely game changer
cons: In the beginning, the user interface didn't feel as robust and easy to navigate. Lately, they've been updating the look and feel and it feels more modern

review_title: Some Useful Integrations, But UI and Limited Options Need Improvement
description: At the moment, AssetSonar is being discontinued due to the lack of flexibility and integrations with major systems.
author: Dyego T.
pros: A few app integrations. Manual import features. It showed a ton of potential at the beginning of the onboarding process.
cons: The UI, processes, lack of flexibility, and integrations with major systems. Information is not easily found. Dashboards' settings are pretty limited.

review_title: A lot better ITAM system compared to others in the similar price range
description: We change to asset sonar because of it allows us to run manual inventory and licensed IT Asset allows to track upto 5 asset related to it.
author: Prad S.
pros: Compliance & Audit Readiness was the key for us to switch to AssetSonar. Integration to Intune is another win. Also each licensed IT asset allows you to track up to five IT peripherals and/or software licenses without requiring additional licenses.
cons: Mobile App is pretty Basic. Also custom reports lack complex filtering. But that does not mean that it is useless.

description: AssetSonar is a really good CMDB, its quite customizable, easy to use, and the support is very good. It is simple to use and organize access groups and give different people access to different levels
author: Justin V.
pros: I like good plugins and integrations with Zendesk, the Intune integrations are also very good. The interface is easy to use and I know I can get exactly the information I need easily. There are also good financial functions to monitor warranty and depreciation values.
cons: Automations don't always work but the support is very helpful and they are able to make changes relatively quickly QR code and label builder could be better
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, its been a good experience with Asset Sonar. Their support and team has been the best part of using this product
author: Timothy W.
pros: Good responsive Team. [sensitive content hidden] has been extremely helpful from start to finish to assist with all setup to make it work exactly how we want it to.
cons: Not too many complaints. Its working as intended how we want AssetSonar to work. Integration is also good

review_title: Asset Sonar Made IT Asset Management Effortless
description: Using Asset Sonar has been a game-changer for our IT asset management process. From the moment we integrated it into our system, the experience was smooth and intuitive. The platform is incredibly user-friendly, with clear templates and detailed guides that made onboarding effortless—even for team members with limited technical backgrounds. What stood out most was how easily Asset Sonar fit into our existing ecosystem. We didn’t need to overhaul our workflows; instead, the application adapted to us. And whenever we had questions or ran into minor issues, the customer support team was quick to respond with helpful, effective solutions.
author: Kimberly S.
pros: Asset Sonar is a comprehensive and cost-effective asset management application designed to seamlessly integrate into any company’s ecosystem. Its intuitive interface and user-friendly design make it easy to adopt, with ready-to-use templates and detailed guides that simplify setup and usage. Should any issues arise, Asset Sonar’s responsive customer support team is readily available to provide prompt and effective solutions. The platform is continuously evolving to meet the growing and dynamic needs of IT asset management, ensuring that businesses stay ahead with reliable and scalable tools.
cons: I have not identified any cons when using asset sonar after 3 years of use. It is truly a great and beneficial application.

review_title: AssetSonar is an incredibly flexible IT Treasure for Asset Management
description: Overall AssetSonar has been a game changer. We went from managing our assets in a spreadsheet to having a concrete record of every device include users, repairs and donations. The flexibility of reporting makes it extremely easy to compare our asset data against any of our other platforms.
author: William M.
pros: More than anything, AssetSonar provides incredible flexibility and compatibility with several major MDM solutions as well as allowing a very large degree of customization to tailor your workspace to you exact needs. The ability to create custom fields, substates, retirement reasons and more. Another great feature is the ability to generate Custom and Detailed reports which the option to run a report of essentially any specific data that you want as opposed to being forced to run a generic report and then pick through the information that is presented. They are also constantly expanding their offering to ensure that they are providing you with the best management platform available especially with their new and expanding offering of SAAS Integrations.
cons: At the moment nothing really comes to mind. Any issue I've had previously has already been fixed or resolved the primary one being the lack of an AssetSOnar Agent for Linux devices and a more straightforward process for instaling the agent on macOS devices. EZO is constantly improving their AssetSonar platform by adding new features and updating old ones.

review_title: Reliable and Scalable Asset Management Solution
description: Overall, AssetSonar has significantly improved how we manage and track company assets. It has reduced time spent on manual updates, minimized asset loss, and provided more accurate lifecycle visibility. The platform has been reliable and responsive, with great customer support whenever we’ve needed assistance. It’s a strong, scalable solution that continues to evolve with our IT infrastructure needs.
author: Zackery T.
pros: AssetSonar makes IT asset tracking incredibly simple and efficient. The automated discovery feature helps us keep a real-time inventory of all hardware, software, and peripherals without manual input. The integration with SSO, Intune, and other management systems has been seamless, making compliance and auditing far easier. The reporting tools also give us clear insights into asset usage and lifecycle management.
cons: The mobile app can sometimes feel limited compared to the web interface, especially when it comes to bulk actions or viewing detailed asset history. Additionally, some customization options for reports and notifications could be more flexible to fit different departmental needs.

description: My overall experience with AssetSonar has been positive. The platform provides an efficient way to track and manage IT assets, offering clear visibility into inventory, licensing, and device assignments. The reporting and integration capabilities are also valuable for compliance and audit readiness.
author: Ehab K.
pros: AssetSonar provides excellent visibility and control over IT assets. Its intuitive interface, detailed tracking features, and strong integration with other platforms make asset management much more efficient. The reporting tools and automated check-in/check-out processes also save significant time.
cons: Some features could be more customizable, particularly in reporting and dashboard views. Bulk updates and asset imports can also take longer than expected, which slows down large-scale inventory changes.

author: Raymond T.
pros: Easy to use, and intuitive, lot of options for customization
cons: There are a limited of items to transfer until the need for an upgrade.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It does what it data in the box!
description: Very good! It’s helped us to get greater control of our assets and gain vital insights as to where our physical assets are, including our spares
author: John M.
pros: For tracking assets, being able to identify who as what, the tool is perfect!
cons: The mobile app needs more work. It feels a little clunky, but that’s not a major negative compared to what it can do!

author: Elena L.
pros: easy to use, everything in one place, great customer service
cons: some features has to be improved ([SENSITIVE CONTENT] know what I mean)

description: Great experience. The program is very robust, so it has a learning curve, but once you get the hang of it, it’s nice to use. And for the things you can’t figure out, the support has been A+.
author: Alexander P.
pros: It has a lot of options, and once you figure them out it works very well. I think with time it will become even better.
cons: some functions are a bit "clunky" but the team is very helpful and will provide assistance when needed.

description: Throughout my experience with the platform, I’ve consistently found the customer support team to be highly responsive, knowledgeable, and committed to resolving issues promptly. Their dedication to user satisfaction significantly enhances the overall value of the service.
author: Brian W.
pros: This is a robust, highly customizable asset management solution that excels in flexibility, enabling organizations to tailor user roles, workflows, and operational processes to align with specific needs and evolving objectives
cons: While the platform offers robust asset management capabilities and customizable workflows, some interface elements exhibit inconsistencies that could benefit from refinement to improve user experience and visual coherence

description: It is good tool as a whole. Generic capabilities are available including reporting and batch upload using csv file.
author: Rick P.
pros: It can scan monitors by using relationship from the CPU. It is unusual for monitoring tools to have this capability. Some will treat it as a separate inventory or tool.
cons: Doesn't have remote capability. I know AS is just an inventory system, though it would be great if it has remote application tool to view computers.

description: It has been great working with Asset Sonar's and the team behind it. Any questions or uncertainties are always easily addressed and answered quickly. Entering data has also been easy and communication is always a priority.
author: Sheyla G.
pros: AssetSonar is a great software for data tracking. I like that it has capabilities for custom fields to allow us to track the information we need specifically.
cons: Sometimes finding glitches in a system can be frustrating. However, the customer service is great, reliable, and timely.

review_title: AssetSonar is by far one of the top asset manager out there.
description: We've been using this over 2+ years and we are enjoying the easy it provides for our organization. It really helps keep our assets organized.
author: Henry L.
pros: The easy of use. We've been using this for over 2+ years. We simply love using this app to keep our asset inventory accurate in our company.
cons: Having no recourse for deletion of an asset is a con for us. Once you guys implement that then I think you guys are golden.

description: Excelente, es muy producto que cubre lo que actualmente necesitamos para tener una excelente Gestion de activos
author: German V.
pros: La fiabilidad del producto, la customizacion que se le puede realizar. Las integraciones y la reporteria
cons: La extraccion de datos podria ser mas facil de utilizar e integrar si es mediante power bi. Los automation podrian contar con mayor flexibilidad

author: Chris M.
pros: The support and account tram are great and responsive. New updates and improvements get pushed out often and suggestions are taken into account.
cons: The UI can sometimes be a little bit clunky and not very thought out. The wording can be improved as at times it's not clear it optimal

review_title: Very straightforward ITAM database great for small companies
description: Very good, and customer team is responsive. Sometimes their answers can be a little confusing or hard to follow, possibly because of ESL.
author: Katherine I.
pros: great UX that's easy to navigate. Although their UX has had a major upgrade recently, it doesn't have that "whole new world" issue a lot of platforms have where suddenly navigating your own solution is impossible.
cons: I find the reports panel pretty busy, but it's still one of the better reports tabs I've seen. Most of the starred reports are logical and would be used by IT teams.

review_title: Overall a good solution for basic inventory needs
author: Sarai R.
pros: Very easy to use and set up. It covers all basic inventory needs. Overall the onboarding process was simple with some minor hiccups in terms of software inventory.
cons: What attributes can be synced between Jamf MDM and AssetSonar. It would be great if we could sync things like who the device is assigned to and recovery key. I'm not a fan of the bidirectional sync for software licenses synced through Okta. I would prefer a single direction sync from Okta to AssetSonar to avoid any de-provisioning issues.

review_title: Solid and stable asset management tool
description: Our overall experience has been very good. We have been able to connect the dots between different information systems and proper asset management.
author: Pablo C.
pros: The stability of the product configuration. The product is easy to configure and does not require any configuration maintenance. The platform is configured once and from then on it is just operated.
cons: Some filters and field controls are excessive, and make the platform somewhat inflexible. Not having the ability to add unlimited custom fields to your modules limits the creativity and use of AssetSonar in different scenarios.

description: It has been a positive experience so far. The agent pulls data that we need from each machine, updating and populating information is easy and straightforward
author: Matthew W.
pros: Many useful features with an agent we can install on endpoints to get active and up to date data. Tracks licensing as well
cons: The reporting UI could be better, but is still able to pull just about anything you would need. Building the reports just requires some trial and error

description: Quick efficient tool, my team mainly leverages it to do our vendor and contract management. The platform makes it super easy to use so that I can get in, do my work and get out of the platform in a short amount of time.
author: Mike C.
pros: Ease of use is at the top of my list with a lot of functionality hidden within. My team mainly uses it for contract / vendor management. Very efficient within that realm.
cons: No dislikes as of now. The tool seems to do everything that is required from a vendor contract management perspective.
